client_updates.highlight: Lighthouse shipped partial columns enabled by default on Hoodi and Sepolia; ~2.5/6 mesh peers upgraded; bandwidth down to 2 MiB/s, DA latency down to ~1.15s avg
Prysm: Fulu partial column changes merged to release branch; Gloas partial column changes in review this week; targeting Gloas devnet 6 for testing
Teku actively working on PeerDAS with several fix releases; PeerDAS likely in production

testing_progress.highlight: Plan to test Gloas partial column changes on Gloas devnet 6 rather than BlobDevNet 0
Sparse blob pool merged in Glamsterdam devnets (Prysm); no EL client has implemented FCU v4 / GetBlobs v4 yet, limiting effective testing
Nethermind has a known bug in GetBlobsV4 (issue #12147); Erigon sparse blob pool PR is open for review and expected to ship soon

action_items.action: Report Nethermind GetBlobsV4 bug to sparse blob pool channel with FLCL tagged

decisions.decision: Gloas partial column changes to be tested on Gloas devnet 6, not BlobDevNet 0
